message:
fix(core): harden byte compression, runtime abort, session resume, and tx execution

byte_compression: Add tagged frame format (RAW_FRAME_TAG/ZSTD_FRAME_TAG)
for self-describing compressed blobs that round-trip losslessly even when
zstd rejects the dictionary. Add size-prefix verification on decompress
that rejects mismatched output sizes. Improve error messages for overflow
edge cases.

runtime_compat (asupersync): Fix JoinHandle abort semantics — store the
most recent waker from poll() and wake it on abort(), so a task blocked
on a JoinHandle is actually notified when the handle is aborted. Without
this, abort() set a flag but nothing woke the waiting future, causing
silent hangs.

session_resume: Harden casr subprocess execution with Stdio::piped(),
working-directory validation, poll-based timeout with configurable
interval, and structured error reporting. Factor out run_casr_with_options
to share logic between version check and normal invocations.

tx_execution: Propagate phase transition errors instead of logging and
swallowing them — execute_commit_steps and compensate now return
Result<(), TxExecutionError>. Add explicit Aborted phase transition
when prepare fails with a terminal state. This ensures the execution
ledger is always in a consistent state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
